basics.name: Abdalkarim Akilan
basics.label: Software Engineer, Fintech
basics.summary: Product-obsessed software engineer with 10+ years building performant web applications. Strong advocate for clean code, TDD, and agile, with a polyglot focus on Java and TypeScript.

work.name: Careem Pay
work.description: Careem Pay is the leading fintech player in the region.

positions.summary: Lead engineering across Careem Pay checkout and platform initiatives.
highlights: Drove platform-wide reliability and DX improvements across multiple squads.
Owned architectural direction for the merchant checkout product.
Built a checkout React application that processes payments for merchants and customers.
Created a shared React component library used across Pay surfaces.
Delivered core checkout flows from zero to production.

work.name: Majid Al Futtaim
work.description: Leading retail and leisure pioneer across MEA and Asia.
work.summary: Core team member building MAF Payments, a payment gateway processing and settling payments between customers and merchants.
highlights: Led development of an Angular-based payment-gateway portal for merchants and internal users.
Mentored junior developers and new recruits to grow team technical capability.

work.name: Mondia
work.summary: Led development of digital entertainment portals with a focus on code quality, runtime performance, and operability.
highlights: Migrated legacy JSP pages to a modern SPA/PWA, improving UX and performance.
Built a reusable Angular component base that cut new-product launch and maintenance time.

education.institution: American University of Sharjah | Sharjah, United Arab Emirates
